title: Null diffusion-based enrichment for metabolomics data.
author: Picart-Armada S Fernandez-Albert F Vinaixa M Rodriguez MA Aivio S Stracker TH Yanes O Perera-Lluna A
content: S-EPMC5718512 PMC5718512 Null diffusion-based enrichment for metabolomics data. Metabolomics experiments identify metabolites whose abundance varies as the conditions under study change.
